example_tasks: Book table at Italian restaurant for anniversary
Prep healthy lunches for the upcoming work week
Buy fresh ingredients for Friday dinner party
Order catering for the quarterly team lunch
Clean and organize the kitchen pantry
Renew subscription to meal kit service
Bake sourdough bread for weekend brunch
Try out the new ramen place downtown
poor_matches: Buy new dining room table and chairs
Research food delivery app API integration
Prepare slide deck for marketing meeting
reasoning: The fork and knife icon is a universally recognized symbol for food, dining, and meals. It is highly effective for distinguishing personal tasks related to cooking, eating out, meal prep, and nutrition from work or general household chores.
